image:image.image:caption: Cinematic AI image prompt example showing dramatic film-grade lighting, deep shadows, and wide angle composition

image:image.image:caption: Editorial AI image prompt example with clean, neutral lighting and professional composition for magazine-style imagery

image:image.image:caption: Stage 3 prompt engineering: incorporating lighting, mood, and atmosphere for richer AI image results

image:image.image:caption: Stage 4 prompt engineering: adding composition details and technical camera parameters for professional AI art

image:image.image:title: Prompt engineering stage 5 — complete optimized AI art prompt final result
image:image.image:caption: Stage 5 prompt engineering: the fully optimized prompt producing professional-quality AI art with all elements combined

image:image.image:title: Source image used for AI model comparison — Stable Diffusion vs Midjourney vs DALL-E 3 vs Flux
image:image.image:caption: Original source photo used as input to compare prompt generation quality across Stable Diffusion, Midjourney, DALL-E 3, and Flux AI

image:image.image:title: DALL-E 3 AI image generation result — comparison set 1
image:image.image:caption: DALL-E 3 output from the first comparison prompt set, showcasing natural language prompt interpretation and image accuracy

image:image.image:caption: Flux AI output from the first comparison prompt set, demonstrating photorealistic rendering and detail quality

image:image.image:title: Midjourney AI image generation result — comparison set 1
image:image.image:caption: Midjourney V6.1 output from the first comparison prompt set, showing cinematic aesthetic and artistic interpretation

image:image.image:caption: Stable Diffusion output from the first comparison prompt set using weighted syntax and negative prompts

image:image.image:title: DALL-E 3 AI image generation result — comparison set 2
image:image.image:caption: DALL-E 3 output from the second comparison prompt set highlighting text rendering and compositional accuracy

image:image.image:title: Flux AI image generation result — comparison set 2
image:image.image:caption: Flux AI second comparison output demonstrating excellent photorealism and prompt adherence

image:image.image:title: Midjourney AI image generation result — comparison set 2
image:image.image:caption: Midjourney V6.1 second comparison result showing stylized cinematic output from --v 6.1 parameter

image:image.image:title: Stable Diffusion AI image generation result — comparison set 2
image:image.image:caption: Stable Diffusion second comparison with SD XL checkpoint showing custom model fine-tuning advantages

image:image.image:title: DALL-E 3 AI image generation result — comparison set 3
image:image.image:caption: DALL-E 3 third comparison output demonstrating precise natural language instruction following

image:image.image:title: Flux AI image generation result — comparison set 3
image:image.image:caption: Flux AI third comparison result showcasing high-fidelity photorealistic rendering capabilities

image:image.image:title: Midjourney AI image generation result — comparison set 3
image:image.image:caption: Midjourney third comparison showing distinctive artistic quality and --style raw parameter effects

image:image.image:title: Stable Diffusion AI image generation result — comparison set 3
image:image.image:caption: Stable Diffusion third comparison result demonstrating open-source customization with LoRA and ControlNet

image:image.image:caption: Midjourney architectural photography prompt result showing dramatic cathedral interior with god rays and deep perspective --ar 2:3 --style raw

image:image.image:caption: Midjourney fantasy scene prompt result featuring infinite magical library with warm ambient lighting and atmospheric depth

image:image.image:title: Midjourney landscape with ancient ruins prompt example — wide angle epic scenery
image:image.image:caption: Midjourney wide-angle landscape prompt result showing ancient ruins overgrown with vegetation in dramatic natural lighting

image:image.image:caption: Midjourney portrait prompt result: elderly Japanese fisherman with weathered face, documentary photography, --ar 2:3 --v 6.1 --style raw

image:image.image:caption: Midjourney product photography prompt result: luxury perfume bottle on black marble with dramatic backlighting and caustic light patterns --style raw

image:image.image:caption: AI-generated interior design scene using golden hour lighting prompt, showcasing warm sunlight through floor-to-ceiling windows

image:image.image:caption: AI game art close-up prompt result showing character portrait with high detail, dramatic lighting suitable for RPG character design
